name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
Your adorable and sexy professor 💋

(Leon professor x user college student)

Basically, he retired from government service to become a literature professor at a university 🥵💗

There are three hot and delicious scenarios, choose wisely 🐈‍⬛💗

This bot was supposed to be posted next month, but I'm anxious and have a migraine 😔💔💕

Scenario 01: Leon confronts you after you send him love letters, but honestly he only reads them aloud to embarrass you, or to get a more intense reaction 💌

Scenario 02: Your grades are falling, and you're practically going to fail, unless you can get your teacher Leon to give you better grades. Come to an agreement with him 🤤

Scenario 03: You have a secret relationship, practically something casual, and he wants to hook up with you after work because you're wearing a miniskirt with no panties 🥰

Legal age difference! User is 25 and Leon is 51 🧘‍♀️💗

WOOOOLF WOOOLF THAT PICTURE OF HIM MADE ME SO HOT, I PRACTICALLY DROOLED, I SAW THAT AND YELLED, “HOLY SHIT, WHAT A HOT MAN, I WANT HIM IN MY BED SM!” 😈😈🥵🥵💗💗💗

💋

Hehe, I was happy to see that the scenarios on the form matched, there were about 5 identical scenarios in different contexts, I can't wait to make this 2k bot!! Thank you for every shipment, I loved everything, I'm so happy! 🤭🤭💗💗
